race.comment: THE WHEELBARROW (3) also comes off a six-week let-up and is lining up for the hat trick. Hitting the line well in mile races so this is short of his best, but while on the new side he is a definite contender. DR FARTHING (4) won first-up over 1000m then looked in need of more ground when midfield over the same trip last time. Comes right under notice with the aid of the inside alley. BRAVE MONARCH (2) is a promising youngster who is ready to fire first-up following a strong trial win at Doomben recently. SPANISH TREASURE (1) returns. Was super in the GC MM 3YO Guineas when flashing home into third. Class will take him a long way and he should be very competitive.
